name: Epstein
short_description: Epstein adasında hesaplaşma! Ball Gates, Danold Tramp ve Leo Cabrio gibi isimleri avla, 4 gizli dosyayı topla ve finalde bizzat Epstein’ı indir! Arkadaşlarınla üs kur, hayatta kal ve bu kaotik çok oyunculu savaşta karanlık bir kurgunun perdelerini arala.
detailed_description:
Epstein

TICKET TO THE ISLAND EXPIRED: TARGET EPSTEIN!

Your mission is clear: Infiltrate the depths of this mysterious island and hunt down the "familiar" urban legends (Ball Gates, Danold Tramp, Leo Cabrio, and Havking) guarding each region. Combine the secret files they drop to craft your VIP Invite and face EPSTEIN himself in the heart of the manor. This is the ultimate survival and execution operation against the shadowy figures of a dark fictional lore!

🎯 THE HUNT LIST: COLLECT FILES, CLEAR THE PATH

To reach the final truth, you must first take down the "guardians" of the island. Each region awaits you with its own boss and unique challenges:

  • The North: Enter the territories of Leo Cabrio and Ball Gates to seize the first file.

  • The South: Face off against Tom Hanx and MJ to bag the second file.

  • The East: Infiltrate the domains of Danold Tramp and AloneMask for the third file.

  • The West: Solve the secrets of Havking and Pitza Gate to reach the final file.

  • CENTRAL: Combine all 4 files, craft your VIP Invite, and settle the score with EPSTEIN!

🏠 DIDDY ISLAND: BUILD YOUR SAFE HAVEN

On Epstein Island, death is around every corner. You’ll need a place to protect your loot. Build your base on Diddy Island, set up your craft stations, and prepare your defenses against raids from other players. Get the loot out, bring it home, and survive!

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
